purpose: Define extended shopper history with visits, postulations, assignments, notifications, WhatsApp, email and certification/payment traces without sending or reading real communications.

visibilityToShopper.principle: The shopper may see communications sent to them and relevant status history, but internal admin notes, scoring deliberations, conflict investigations and sensitive audit details must remain internal.

historicalImportRules: Historical visit completion must be imported from all relevant HR sheets/tabs, not only one month.
Cinepolis historical visits must pull completed/submitido/payment-relevant status from HR tabs as available.
Imported history must not expose raw sensitive fields to shopper.
Historical communication traces may start empty unless source exists.
traceRules: Every communication should link to shopperId and optionally projectId, visitId, postulationId, assignmentId or paymentId.
Email and WhatsApp traces must appear in shopper history when directed to the shopper.
Internal communications about a shopper may exist but need role-based visibility.
Do not mark WhatsApp API/email provider sends as real unless future provider confirms.
Manual logs must preserve who logged, when and source.

newLessons: Which communications the shopper can see
How WhatsApp and email traces are linked
How historical visits are imported from HR

hardStops: Do not read or send real emails from this contract.
Do not send WhatsApp API messages from this contract.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not expose internal-only notes to shoppers.
Do not import raw sensitive HR fields into shopper-visible history.
